pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version from 11 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.4.2 to 3.3.1, which requires Java 17+ and Jakarta EE 9+.
Replace javax.validation with jakarta.validation to comply with Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes.
Update Spring Cloud version to 2023.0.3 to be compatible with Spring Boot 3.3.x.
Upgrade Spring Kafka to 3.2.2 to support Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.
Update JAXB to version 4.0.5, which is the Jakarta EE 9+ compatible version.
Upgrade Liquibase to 4.28.0 to ensure compatibility with newer Spring Boot and Java versions.
Update Jackson Databind to 2.17.2 for security patches and feature updates.
Upgrade Ehcache to 3.10.8 for maintenance and compatibility.
Add Mantis Runtime dependency for distributed computing capabilities.
Add MockNeat dependency for data generation in tests.
Add Spring Cloud Netflix Zuul starter for API gateway functionality.
Add Spring Cloud Config Client dependency for configuration management.
Bump the project artifact version to 2.8.108.
Consolidate version management by using a single property for Spring Boot starters.

.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Update the CI workflow to use JDK 17 instead of JDK 8 to align with the target runtime environment.
Upgrade GitHub Actions dependencies to their latest major versions for improved security and features.
Switch the Java distribution in CI from the default to Zulu for consistent build environments.
Remove the explicit Maven cache step, likely relying on default runner caching or deeming it unnecessary.
Restrict the CI workflow to run only on pull requests, removing the push trigger for the master branch.
Modify the Maven command to explicitly run the package goal before install.

README.md.general_idea: Replace the old GitHub Actions workflow badge with a new one pointing to the release-train workflow.

settings.xml.general_idea: Add Maven Central repository to the GitHub profile to ensure standard dependencies can be resolved.
Update the GitHub Packages repository URL to point to a specific scope or organization path.
Replace hardcoded GitHub password with an environment variable reference to improve security.
Add missing newline at the end of the settings.xml file to comply with POSIX standards.
